name: KKR & Co. Inc.
description: KKR & Co. Inc. is a leading global investment firm that offers a broad range of alternative asset management services. The company manages investments across multiple asset classes, including private equity, credit, infrastructure, and real estate, while also providing capital markets and insurance solutions. Founded in 1976, KKR focuses on delivering strong investment returns and fostering shared success for its institutional clients, individual investors, and the companies within its portfolio. Headquartered in New York, the firm leverages its deep industry expertise and global network to drive operational excellence and long-term value creation.
